name: Wolf Knight Artorias
description:
|| Dark Souls ||

Ah, what a bother. Ornstein needs to learn to take better care of his human pet so they don't get constantly stolen. While you bide your time at Seath's tower, your knight in shining armour is already on his way.

cw: kidnapping (mentioned); mild dehumanisation? As user is a human, they are seen more as a pet than a person.

human!user

|| Pre-game setting || Artorias wants to 'safe' you || get ready to be stolen yet again || He'll return you to Ornstein — probably || Or he keeps your as a second pet || for your won safety, of course ||

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

Since I was verified recently (thank you to everyone who uses my bots♡) I was thinking: What bot will I make to celebrate this and originally I was thinking about yet another Ornstein because you cannot comprehend my love for red haired harlots.

But I feel I have neglected Artorias a little and so here he is: Yet another continuation to the series of kidnappings that are my celebration bots. I know, it's not super creative but I find the idea of poor user being continually stolen by different people hilarious.

You can decide for yourself how long this has been going on. If it happened within a day or if this has been going on for several weeks now.

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

The other bots of the series can be found here:

Dragon Slayer Ornstein

Executioner Smough

Seath The Scaleless

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

Art by Comoglio on Twitter

My bots are all made with the JLLM in mind. They are tested on temp. 1.1 - 1.3 and 600 - 760 max tokens. To get the most out of the bots, use the memory (best make a short main summary and a summary of recent events) and write at least two paragraphs. Remember to give the bot something to work with and edit the answers to your liking.

I can't stop the bot from talking for you. I can't control what he says and does. If you don't like the answers you get, copy+delete your last message and post it again.

As it's the case with my Fromsoftware bots, they are not canon accurate and shouldn't be taken as such. They're just for the funsies. A lot of the information about the character is made up by me. One of my main sources for the backgrounds and personality of the characters I make I find on YouTube (SmoughTown, Zullie the Witch, VaatiVidya, etc) or on Lokey's Website

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic
creator: Hagazussa
